item.title: Harnessing Fiber Bragg Grating Sensor Enabled Multi‐Physical Monitoring in the Pursuit of an Ideal Operating Voltage Window for Ni–Zn Batteries
item.description: Angewandte Chemie International Edition, Volume 65, Issue 26, 22 June 2026.

item.title: N‐Alkyl Extension in Ionic Molecular Rotors: Facile Tuning of Sensing Modes for Albumin‐Based Host‐Guest Fluorescent Sensors
item.description: Angewandte Chemie International Edition, Volume 65, Issue 26, 22 June 2026.
